title: Define LICHEN brand concept
description: Create a durable brand concept for LICHEN centered on operation beyond dependable infrastructure. Define positioning, primary and supporting taglines, visual metaphor, restrained orange color system, Atkinson Hyperlegible typography, voice, accessibility, monochrome/e-ink behavior, hardware applications, and boundaries for later logo development. Avoid making current protocol components such as IPv6, LoRa, or CoAP the timeless brand promise.
acceptance_criteria: A checked-in brand concept document defines audience, promise, narrative, tagline hierarchy, logo brief, color palette with restrained orange usage, Atkinson Hyperlegible typography, voice examples, accessibility rules, e-ink/PCB/hardware applications, naming guidance, anti-patterns, and next design deliverables; language leads with where LICHEN works; no final logo is falsely presented as adopted; document carries the project documentation SPDX headers.
close_reason: Created docs/brand-concept.md with production-ready aspirational positioning led by 'Where infrastructure ends, LICHEN grows.', Signal on Stone visual direction, restrained orange palette, Atkinson Hyperlegible typography, voice, accessibility, e-ink/hardware behavior, naming, boundaries, and next design deliverables. Three independent reviews completed; concrete coherence, accessibility, durability, and naming findings were resolved. git diff --check passes.
